paragraphs: Affordability never looked so attractive with an elegant SimpliFire® electric fireplace. In linear or traditional models, you can have a mesmerizing fire any time and place a TV right above it. Simplicity wins the day with comfort and beauty close behind.
Kick outdoor living up a notch while adding value to your home. Straightforward to install, an outdoor model extends the patio season to a year-round affair your friends and family can enjoy.

So easy to install, our wall-mount electric fireplaces instantly transform any room into a beautiful, inviting space. You can place one anywhere without the need for gas lines or venting, using only a wall outlet.

Say good-bye to the hassle of wood, and hello to instant fireplace enjoyment with a SimpliFire electric fireplace insert. They fit snugly into your existing fireplace opening as the perfect way to bring new life to an old space.

A sleek and stunning appearance defines SimpliFire built-in electric fireplaces. With a clean finish, no exposed seams, dazzling logs, and surrealistic LED flames you can change at a whim, SimpliFire sets the standard.
